caption.full:
Sydney Sweeney to star in reimagined Sleepy Hollow film 'Hollow'

Sydney Sweeney is set to star in 'Hollow,' a new film adaptation of 'The Legend of Sleepy Hollow' for Sony Pictures. Lindsey Anderson Beer is directing and adapting the story, which will be told from Katrina Van Tassel's perspective. Sony Pictures has begun casting for Brom Bones and Ichabod Crane.

Who do you hope gets cast as Brom Bones and Ichabod Crane, and how do you imagine their dynamic?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #SleepyHollow #SydneySweeney
